info.title: Hypixel API
info.description: Official Hypixel API documentation for accessing player data, game information, resources, and more. Requires API key for authentication and has rate limits for requests.

get.summary: Data of a specific player, including game stats
get.description: Returns comprehensive player data including UUID, display name, rank, login times, and game statistics

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Player UUID (supports both dashed and undashed versions)

stats.description: Game statistics organized by game type database name

RateLimit-Limit.description: The limit of requests per minute for the provided API key

RateLimit-Remaining.description: The remaining amount of requests allowed for the current minute

RateLimit-Reset.description: The amount of seconds until the next minute and the reset of the API key usages

400.description: Some data is missing, this is usually a field.

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.summary: The recently played games of a specific player
get.description: Returns the list of recently played games for a specific player

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Player UUID (supports both dashed and undashed versions)

400.description: Some data is missing, this is usually a field.

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.summary: The current online status of a specific player
get.description: Returns the current online status and session information for a specific player

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Player UUID (supports both dashed and undashed versions)

400.description: Some data is missing, this is usually a field.

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.summary: Retrieve a Guild by a player, id, or name
get.description: Returns guild information based on the provided query parameter. Only one query parameter should be used.

400.description: Some data is missing, this is usually a field.

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.description: Returns information about Hypixel Games. This endpoint is in early development.
Returns information about achievements
Returns information about challenges
Returns information about quests
Returns information about guild achievements
Returns information about vanity pets
Returns information about vanity companions
Information regarding Collections in the SkyBlock game
Information regarding skills in the SkyBlock game
Information regarding items in the SkyBlock game
Information regarding the current mayor and ongoing election in SkyBlock
Information regarding the current bingo event and its goals
Returns SkyBlock news items

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.summary: Request auction(s) by the auction UUID, player UUID, or profile UUID
get.description: Returns the auctions selected by the provided query. Only one query parameter can be used in a single request, and cannot be filtered by multiple.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The auction UUID that you wish to request

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: The player UUID that you wish to request

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: The profile UUID that you wish to request

data.description: Base64 encoded string containing gzipped NBT data

400.description: Some data is missing, this is usually a field.

403.description: Access is forbidden, usually due to an invalid API key being used.

429.description: A request limit has been reached, usually this is due to the limit on the key being reached but can also be triggered by a global throttle.

get.description: Returns the currently active auctions
Returns recently ended auctions
Returns bazaar information
Returns SkyBlock profile data by profile UUID
Returns all SkyBlock profiles for a player
Returns museum data for a SkyBlock profile
Returns garden data for a SkyBlock profile
Returns bingo data for a player
Returns information about active and upcoming fire sales

Returns detailed information about a specific house

get.summary: The public houses for a specific player
get.description: Returns all public houses owned by a specific player
Returns information about currently active network boosters
Returns current player counts across all games
Returns current leaderboard information
Returns punishment statistics for the network

ApiKey.description: Obtained via the Hypixel Developer Dashboard when creating an application. You can also request higher limits for production applications in this dashboard.
ApiKey.name: API-Key

cause.description: Error message describing what went wrong
